title: ICMR NIRBID Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Young Professional II Posts
description: ICMR National Institute of Research on Blood and Immune Disorders (NIRBID) has declared the latest job notification for the recruitment of various Young Professional II Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the M.Sc, BAMS, and MD/ MS can grab this chance and apply for the ICMR NIRBID Notification 2026 . Here we mentioned more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidat...
